name: 60/80/100/120W Selectable LED Semi Cutoff Wall Pack Light
description: Recommended Applications: Commercial Building Perimeters Parking Lots & Garages Walkways, Entrances & Loading Areas Security Lighting Zones The ZION LED USA Semi Cutoff Wall Pack Light delivers flexible, high-efficiency illumination for outdoor environments. With field-selectable wattage and tunable CCT, it adapts to varying project needs while minimizing energy costs. ZION LED USA delivers smart, adaptable lighting solutions built for performance and efficiency. This wall pack is the perfect combination of power, control, and design.
short_desc: Product Overview: The ZION LED USA Semi Cutoff Wall Pack Light delivers flexible, high-efficiency illumination for outdoor environments. With field-selectable wattage and tunable CCT, it adapts to varying project needs while minimizing energy costs. Specifications: Power Selectable: 60W / 80W / 100W / 120W CCT Options: 3500K / 4000K / 5000K Input Voltage: 120-277V AC Design: Semi cutoff – reduces uplight, limits glare Housing: Durable, weather-resistant construction Lens: High-impact polycarbonate for uniform light output Mounting: Wall-mounted – easy installation
